title: Bastila Shan — KOTOR Jedi Companion
chunkText: Bastila Shan is a Jedi Knight in KOTOR 1 and a major companion. She possesses the rare Force talent of Battle Meditation — boosting friendly forces while demoralizing enemies. She and Revan share a Force Bond formed during the rescue mission. She is a potential romance option for a male player. Bastila uses a double-bladed yellow lightsaber. She is later captured by Darth Malak and temporarily falls to the dark side before being redeemed.
